checks.name: release_migration_proof_suite
release_behavioral_tests
checks.run:
import subprocess
result=subprocess.run(['py','-3.11','-m','pytest','-q','tests/test_migration.py','tests/test_product_missions.py'],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=90,check=False)
assert result.returncode == 0, result.stdout + result.stderr
